meta.title: Your Desk - example.com
meta.description: A customizable notebook-style personal homepage template.

surface.title: a few notes
stickyQuotes: Replace this note with your own.

profile.name: Your Name
profile.intro: Write a short intro here: who you are, what you are building, what you care about, and where people should start. This template works well as a personal navigation page, portfolio entry, blog home, or tiny project portal.

columns.title: What I Build
items: List your skills or interests here.
Keep the most important 3 to 5 points.
You can mention tools, creative work, or current learning goals.
Short lines make the note feel more natural.

items.text: Project One: describe the problem it solves in one sentence.
Project Two: mention your role, stack, or result.
Writing / Notes: link your posts, notes, or public resources.

services.title: Small Things On The Desk
services.intro: Use this section for public links: resources, guestbook, small tools, demos, or a shop. Delete any card you do not need.

items.title: Resource Shelf
items.desc: Tools, assets, and notes you keep returning to.

items.title: Whiteboard / Tool
items.desc: Link a small public tool or interactive page.

items.title: Guestbook
items.desc: A place for visitors to leave a short note.

items.title: Work / Shop
items.desc: Show downloadable, purchasable, or tryable work.

services.footnote: Replace these example links with your real destinations.
